case_title: JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP VS. BOOPIE, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60249800) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP
FEE PAID FOR FIRST APPEARANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 60249800) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOOPIE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BOOPIE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-19-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2017

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOPIE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $30,251.87 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,251.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
